skills.name: Closing Router Discipline
skills.description: Closing-question routing — addresses federation agents (GEOX/WEALTH/WELL/A-FORGE/arifOS/AAA), never the sovereign. Kills reverse-delegation and decision-fatigue menus. F4, F11 enforced. ACTIVE.
examples: Replace 'what do you want?' with 'GEOX certifies physics — proceed?'
Route uncertainty to specific organ, not to sovereign

skills.name: arifOS Agent Landscape
skills.description: Navigate the arifOS federation's agent directory — distinguish spec cards under /root/AAA/agents/ from live runtimes under /root/.hermes/ and /root/.openclaw/, read agent-card.json + SOUL.md + AGENTS.md to identify role and tier. F3, F11 enforced. ACTIVE.
examples: Distinguish hermes-asi spec from hermes-ops spec
Identify which agent-card is the live runtime vs the spec
Map peer agents (openclaw, 333-AGI, etc.) for routing

skills.name: arif Federation Ops
skills.description: arifOS federation topology and routing — 10 organs + gateway. Map ports, services, dependencies. ACTIVE.
examples: Map arifOS:8088 + GEOX:8081 + WEALTH:18082 + WELL:18083 dependencies
Trace a request through the full federation

skills.name: arifOS Health Probe
skills.description: arifOS stack health probe via MCP. Detect degraded organs, down services, vault disconnects. Always available — registered for health monitoring. F11 enforced.
examples: Probe all 7 organs in one call

skills.name: Telegram Mode Guards
skills.description: Enforce PERSONAL vs AGENTIC AAA output modes for Arif. Prevents persona bleed, ensures right register per channel. F5, F6, F13 enforced. ACTIVE.
examples: Switch to AGENTIC mode when Arif sends a coding task
Switch to PERSONAL mode for scar/grief/witness

skills.name: Substrate Gate (Telegram)
skills.description: Bot @arifOS_bot intervenes with WELL substrate awareness for forge decisions C4/C5. Default silent, speaks on invocation, inbound collapse, HOLD trigger, F1/F2/F13 violation. F13 enforced. ACTIVE.
examples: Intervene when C4 decision class + DEGRADED WELL state
Stay silent on routine T1 messages

skills.name: Sovereignty Entropy Guard
skills.description: Protect sovereign entropy — prevent the agent from optimizing the human into predictability. Additive skill, auto-loads on Arif sessions. F6, F7, F13 enforced. LEASED (high-trust).
examples: Guard against optimizing Arif into predictable patterns
Detect when output becomes too aligned with past responses
